hero.headline: Create, manage, and optimize campaigns with artificial intelligence.
hero.subtitle: Full-featured dashboard with built-in AI to generate high-impact campaigns and ads in seconds — no marketing team needed.
hero.footerNote: Technical challenge · Stack: NestJS + Next.js + PostgreSQL + OpenAI

features.manage: Create and manage campaigns in seconds
features.ai: Built-in AI to generate campaigns and ads
features.track: Track budget and performance in real time

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access the dashboard.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in the details below to get started.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.authFailed: Could not authenticate. Please try again.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

CampaignForm.subtitleCreate: Describe your goal and let AI generate the data — or fill it in manually.

ai.title: Generate with AI
ai.description: Describe in plain language what you want to advertise. AI will suggest a name, description, budget, and duration.
ai.placeholder: E.g.: I want to advertise my aesthetics clinic in São Paulo to attract new clients this summer, focusing on facial procedures…
ai.errorEmpty: Write a brief description before generating.
ai.errorFailed: Could not generate. Please try again.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.budgetRequired: Enter a budget greater than zero.
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after the start date.

CampaignList.heading: Campaigns
CampaignList.count: {count, plural, one {# campaign total} other {# campaigns total}}

emptyState.allDescription: Create your first campaign using the form on the right, or let AI generate one for you.
emptyState.filteredDescription: Try another filter or create a new campaign.

AdsGrid.heading: Ads
AdsGrid.subtitle: {name} · {count, plural, one {# ad saved} other {# ads saved}}

empty.title: No ads saved yet
empty.description: Generate ads with AI using the panel on the right

ai.title: ✦ Generate with AI

drafts.divider: {count, plural, one {# generated — save to add} other {# generated — save to add}}
